name: Windows Packet Monitoring Tool Usage Detected
description: Detects the execution of `pktmon.exe` (Packet Monitor). Pktmon is a built-in Windows network diagnostics tool. Adversaries may abuse it to sniff network traffic and capture sensitive information.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'pktmon.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the pktmon.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute pktmon.exe.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which pktmon.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
